Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Have you noticed how popular Sanada-san is with the ladies? Man, take a look at that...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I guess neither of us really got to know him before all this crazy stuff happened.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}He's the captain of the boxing team. Never lost a single match. I know that's cool and all, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Who'da thought boxing would turn you into a chick magnet!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I mean, come on! They're fawning on him more than a harem manga! I wonder where they're going...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Hey, are you guys free this afternoon?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}I-I mean, hell yeah! We'd love to join your little, uh, group here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_005_2_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What about the fate of the world?

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Ah, don't be lame... Even heroes need some rest now and then, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I want the two of you to meet me at Paulownia Mall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}You know where it is, right? I'll be waiting at the police station.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 3 25 25}You mean, we're not hangin' out with your friends...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}No, I don't even know their names. Hearing so much chitchat gives me a headache.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Anyway, I'm going on ahead. Don't keep me waiting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Man, how can he not know their names!? I mean, seriously! Just look at them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sanada asked us to meet him at[n]the Paulownia Mall police station...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei and I decided to head over.[n]{f 1 1}
